textByHashes.129b19bbe8031926c5b92f85e84ac4dd9385310c: You left the shrine. Did Zulrah reject your sacrifice?
textByHashes.46f480d461092f3b81f54dec418fa5cebdb31cdd: Is that what you think? Board the boat again, and I am sure you will find Zulrah has overcome whatever pitiful attacks you used against him.
textByHashes.e1008f095e2bfb8432eb0e5ba9c36339bb990f5b: Once I have brought you to the shrine, I will leave you there as an offering to Zulrah. You cannot use the boat to return.
textByHashes.f2db69fa49d77fdcc2627396015dd38ccb635022: You can use your magical powers to flee from Zulrah's grasp, though that would defeat the point of the sacrifice, and you'll have to try again.
textByHashes.24ccd45eb07b9acc8e98c2199e36870b9893fee7: When Zulrah inevitably kills you, I may be able to retrieve your dropped possessions. If so, I will hold them here.
textByHashes.9074eae0622255f29e3e871d30396b8d08e5fa74: Now board the boat and prepare to be sacrificed.
textByHashes.878a34c1d08a61c01195ff8a5570ff328543b5df: Leave me, human, I have a sacrifice to prepare. If you wish for information, go and see the High Priestess.
textByHashes.f501f35f4c6c94421ec4f5e74714011425c5ca65: The sacrificial boat is not for you! Begone, and do not meddle in our sacred rites.
textByHashes.6be304911046d59e58c678ef225b5b073ac108c9: You display complete ignorance of our sacred rites. Perhaps the High Priestess will consent to enlighten you.
textByHashes.f8673b945142778dcb47e48c54103b4bc733b372: It is rare for a traveller to make such an offer! Very well, I shall explain the ritual to you...
textByHashes.453aaf1570656abb51e6d1cb02333cf881c9dc27: Are you ready to face Zulrah?
textByHashes.b9a1913d58b453d7393056d8c4ebefd4cb6b9767: I shall now transport you to Zulrah's shrine and offer your life on behalf of our tribe.
textByHashes.054ec272698d089d20ad6db834c3a3fc71809476: Well, board the boat and let me take you there again quickly, before Zulrah becomes impatient!
textByHashes.3ee05ce1ce2318d62a8b40c62281243eb9782c80: I'm afraid I don't have anything for you to collect. If I had any of your items, but you died before collecting them from me, I'd lose them.
textByHashes.bddff92a02791ed184527bb1feab75653fe3293e: You left some stuff at Zulrah's shrine when you left earlier. I've returned it to you now.
textByHashes.0b8f694eba875b6b7eaf0d5c0606687427870486: You left some stuff at Zulrah's shrine when you left earlier. Clear some more inventory space and I'll give you the rest.
textByHashes.89685d299a8d200a458ea7fda39bb95d97351b42: You left some stuff at Zulrah's shrine when you left earlier. Clear some inventory space and I'll give it back.
textByHashes.593e8a0163d46050a0a9af12adceb6e562803cde: You left some stuff at Zulrah's shrine when you left earlier. You'd better deal with it before returning.
